I understand that I am disconnecting any: I understand that I am disconnecting any WordPress.com account, Google account and Google Ads account connected to this extension.
Send Enhanced Conversions data to Google: Send Enhanced Conversions data to Google Ads
Enhanced Conversions is a feature design: Enhanced Conversions is a feature designed to improve your measurement accuracy by collecting privacy-conscious data without the need for third-party cookies.
Please connect your Google Ads account i: Please connect your Google Ads account in order to use Enhanced Conversions data.
Please make sure to follow the documenta: Please make sure to follow the documentation to enable Enhanced Conversions. The feature needs to be enabled both here on WooCommerce and on your Google Ads account.
Your change to tax rate has been saved a: Your change to tax rate has been saved and will be synced to your Google Merchant Centre.
There was an error synchronizing tax rat: There was an error synchronising tax rate to Google Merchant Centre.
There was an error saving tax rate.
A WordPress.com account, Google account,: A WordPress.com account, Google account, Google Merchant Centre account, and Google Ads account are required to use this extension in WooCommerce.
Connect your WordPress.com account to en: Connect your WordPress.com account to ensure your products stay listed on Google. If you do not re-connect, your products can’t be automatically synced to Google, and any existing listings may be removed from Google.
Your WordPress.com account has been disc: Your WordPress.com account has been disconnected.
Your store address is required by Google: Your store address is required by Google for verification purposes. It will be shared with the Google Merchant Centre and will not be displayed to customers.
Thus, it doesn\u2018t have access to the: Thus, it doesn‘t have access to the Google Merchant Centre and/or Google Ads account currently connected to this WooCommerce store.
Try connecting with a different Google a: Try connecting with a different Google account, or completely disconnect all your connected accounts.
This Google account, <accountEmail \/>,: This Google account, <accountEmail />, was not the Google account previously connected to this integration.
Any active product listings will continu: Any active product listings will continue to show on Google. They can be managed, edited, or deleted manually from Google Merchant Centre (merchants.google.com).
Any ongoing campaigns will continue to r: Any ongoing campaigns will continue to run. They can be managed, edited, or deleted manually from Google Ads (ads.google.com).
I understand that I am disconnecting any: I understand that I am disconnecting any WordPress.com account, Google account, Google Merchant Centre account and Google Ads account connected to this extension.
A WordPress.com account, Google account: A WordPress.com account, Google account and Google Ads account are required to use this extension in WooCommerce.
Some configurations for Google Ads creat: Some configurations for Google Ads created through WooCommerce may be lost. This cannot be undone.
I understand that I am disconnecting my: I understand that I am disconnecting my Google Ads account from this WooCommerce extension.
Yes, I want to disconnect my Google Ads: Yes, I want to disconnect my Google Ads account.
Yes, I want to disconnect all my account: Yes, I want to disconnect all my accounts.
I\u2019ll set my tax rates up manually i: I’ll set my tax rates up manually in <link>Google Merchant Centre</link>. I understand that if I don’t set this up, my products will be disapproved.
My store does not use destination-based: My store does not use destination-based tax rates.
Google\u2019s estimated tax rates will a: Google’s estimated tax rates will automatically be applied to my product listings.
My store uses destination-based tax rate: My store uses destination-based tax rates.
This tax rate will be shown to potential: This tax rate will be shown to potential customers, together with the cost of your product.
